periods.label: Q1 2026
periods.summary: Launch of key courses on OSS and PT products: NTA, SAST, SIEM, WAF, AM. Auto-deployment platform for trainers.

items.name: OSS Tools in Network Attack Analysis using NTA
items.description: 8 new cases on Open Source tools Arkime and Wireshark. Total of 40 practical cases in the course.

items.name: New Course: Fixing Web Vulnerabilities using SAST
items.description: Course on source code analysis of web applications and subsequent web vulnerability remediation. Practice with 14 cases on PT AI.

items.name: EdTechLab Installer — Auto-Deployment Platform
items.description: Platform for automated deployment of the software complex for any configuration in On-Premise delivery.

items.name: New Course: Asset Management using AM
items.description: Course on asset management. Theoretical module available in April 2026. Course includes 10 practical cases from the start.

items.name: Course Update: Security Event Analysis using SIEM
items.description: New cases added. Total of 25 practical cases in the course.

items.name: Course Update: Web Application Attack Analysis using WAF
items.description: New cases added. Total of 30 practical cases in the course.

periods.label: Q2 2026
periods.summary: Beta testers program launch, new complex incident investigation course, and metaplatform with SaaS support.

items.name: PT ETL Testers Program Launch
items.description: We’re developing this simulator in collaboration with our users. Try out the training materials in the beta version, tell us how user-friendly you find it, and suggest improvements. Every comment helps us to grow!.

items.name: New Course: Comprehensive Investigation of Cyberattacks
items.description: Course on investigating complex cyber attacks using multiple security tools. Less theory, more practice on real attack chains. Red to blue practice: users first act as hackers breaking infrastructure, then investigate sophisticated attack chains.

items.name: New Course: ATT&CK Playbook: TTP in Practice
items.description: Course on infrastructure security assessment. 100+ practical cases for TTP training in Red Team projects.

items.name: Metaplatform Beta Version
items.description: Major update of EdTechLab Academy learning platform. UX/UI refresh, new features. SaaS format support.

items.name: New Course: Threat Detection with EDR
items.description: Course on threat detection and analysis at endpoints using EDR.

periods.label: Q3 2026
periods.summary: Introduction to Cybersecurity, first release of autonomous learning metaplatform, and VM course update.

items.name: New Course: Introduction to Cybersecurity
items.description: Course on IT fundamentals with cybersecurity focus. 4 modules covering OS administration, computer networking, and web application deployment.

items.name: First Release of Autonomous Learning Metaplatform
Course Update: Vulnerability Remediation using VM
items.description: New cases added. Total of 25 practical cases in the course.

periods.label: Q4 2026
periods.summary: ICS attack analysis course, new OSS cases for WAF and SIEM, asset management course expansion.

items.name: New Course: ICS Cyber Attack Analysis using PT ISIM
items.description: Course on investigating cyber attacks on technological infrastructure.

items.name: OSS Tools in Web Application Attack Analysis using WAF
items.description: New cases on SafeLine. Total of 35 practical cases in the course.

items.name: OSS Tools in Security Event Analysis using SIEM
items.description: New cases on Wazuh. Total of 35 practical cases in the course.

items.name: Course Update: Asset Management using AM
items.description: New cases added. Total of 20 practical cases in the course.
